All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Enum Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractGeminiClient
    Abstract base class for Gemini client implementations, providing shared functionality.
    AbstractHttpClient
    Abstract base class for HTTP client implementations, providing common functionality.
    AbstractJsonService
    Abstract base class for JSON serialization and deserialization implementations.
    AbstractJsonService
    Abstract base class for JSON serialization and deserialization implementations.
    AbstractResource
    Abstract base class for resource implementations, providing shared functionality.
    AnswerStyle
    Represents the desired style for grounded answers generated by the Gemini API.
    AnswerStyle.AnswerStyleBuilder  
    AnswerStyleEnum
    Specifies the desired style for generating grounded answers from the Gemini API.
    AttributionSourceId
    Identifier for the source contributing to this attribution.
    AttributionSourceId.AttributionSourceIdBuilder  
    BaseClass
    Base class that provides logging functionality for all classes in the application.
    BatchEmbedContentsRequest
    Request for generating multiple embeddings from the model in a synchronous call.
    BatchEmbedContentsRequest.BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder  
    BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating BatchEmbedContentsRequest instances.
    BatchEmbedContentsResponse
    The response to a BatchEmbedContentsRequest.
    BatchEmbedContentsResponse.BatchEmbedContentsResponseBuilder  
    BatchEmbedTextResponse
    The response to an EmbedTextRequest.
    BatchEmbedTextResponse.BatchEmbedTextResponseBuilder  
    Blob
    Raw media bytes.
    Blob.BlobBuilder  
    BlobBuilder
    Builder for creating Blob instances.
    BlockedReason
    Represents the reason why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
    BlockedReason.BlockedReasonBuilder  
    BlockedReasonEnum
    Lists the possible reasons why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
    BlockReason
    Represents the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.
    BlockReason.BlockReasonBuilder  
    BlockReasonEnum
    Specifies the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.
    CachedContent
    Represents a cached content.
    CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder  
    Candidate
    A response candidate generated from the model.
    Candidate.CandidateBuilder  
    Chunk
    A Chunk is a subpart of a Document that is treated as an independent unit for the purposes of vector representation and storage.
    Chunk.ChunkBuilder  
    ChunkData
    Extracted data that represents the Chunk content.
    ChunkData.ChunkDataBuilder  
    CitationMetadata
    A collection of source attributions for a piece of content.
    CitationMetadata.CitationMetadataBuilder  
    CitationSource
    A citation to a source for a portion of a specific response.
    CitationSource.CitationSourceBuilder  
    Condition
    Filter condition applicable to a single key.
    Condition.ConditionBuilder  
    Content
    The base structured datatype containing multipart content of a message.
    Content.ContentBuilder  
    ContentBuilder
    Builder for creating Content instances.
    ContentEmbedding
    A list of floats representing an embedding.
    ContentEmbedding.ContentEmbeddingBuilder  
    ContentFilter
    Content filtering metadata associated with processing a single request.
    ContentFilter.ContentFilterBuilder  
    CountMessageTokensResponse
    A response from models.countMessageTokens.
    CountMessageTokensResponse.CountMessageTokensResponseBuilder  
    CountTextTokensResponse
    A response from models.countTextTokens.
    CountTextTokensResponse.CountTextTokensResponseBuilder  
    CountTokensResponse
    Response from models.countTokens.
    CountTokensResponse.CountTokensResponseBuilder  
    CustomHttpClient
    Custom HTTP client implementation that wraps a user-provided HttpClient.
    CustomMetadata
    User provided metadata stored as key-value pairs.
    CustomMetadata.CustomMetadataBuilder  
    DefaultHttpClient
    Default implementation of the HttpClient interface using Apache HttpClient.
    EmbedContentExample
    Example demonstrating the usage of the EmbedResource in the Gemini4j library.
    EmbedContentRequest
    Request containing the Content for the model to embed.
    EmbedContentRequest.EmbedContentRequestBuilder  
    EmbedContentRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating EmbedContentRequest instances.
    EmbedContentResponse
    The response to an EmbedContentRequest.
    EmbedContentResponse
    The response to an EmbedContentRequest.
    EmbedContentResponse.EmbedContentResponseBuilder  
    EmbedContentResponse.EmbedContentResponseBuilder  
    Embedding
    Represents an embedding generated by the Gemini API.
    Embedding.EmbeddingBuilder  
    EmbedResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the embedding resource of the Gemini API.
    EmbedResourceImpl
    Implementation of the EmbedResource interface for interacting with the embedding resource of the Gemini API.
    EmbedTextRequest
    Request to get a text embedding from the model.
    EmbedTextRequest.EmbedTextRequestBuilder  
    EmbedTextResponse
    The response to an EmbedTextRequest.
    EmbedTextResponse.EmbedTextResponseBuilder  
    ErrorResponse
    Represents an error response from the Gemini API.
    ErrorResponse.ErrorResponseBuilder  
    FileData
    URI based data.
    FileData.FileDataBuilder  
    FileDataBuilder
    Builder for creating FileData instances.
    FinishReason
    Represents the reason why the Gemini API model stopped generating tokens for a particular candidate response.
    FinishReason.FinishReasonBuilder  
    FinishReasonEnum
    Defines the possible reasons why the Gemini API model stopped generating tokens for a particular candidate response.
    FunctionCall
    A predicted FunctionCall returned from the model that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name with the arguments and their values.
    FunctionCall.FunctionCallBuilder  
    FunctionCallBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionCall instances.
    FunctionCallingConfig
    Configuration for specifying function calling behavior.
    FunctionCallingConfig.FunctionCallingConfigBuilder  
    FunctionCallingConfigBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionCallingConfig instances.
    FunctionDeclaration
    Structured representation of a function declaration as defined by the OpenAPI 3.03 specification.
    FunctionDeclaration.FunctionDeclarationBuilder  
    FunctionDeclarationBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionDeclaration instances.
    FunctionResponse
    The result output from a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
    FunctionResponse.FunctionResponseBuilder  
    FunctionResponseBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionResponse instances.
    GeminiApiException
    Base class for all exceptions thrown by the Gemini4J library.
    GeminiClient
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Google Gemini API.
    GeminiClientBuilder
    Builder for creating GeminiClient instances.
    GeminiClientImp
    Implementation of the GeminiClient interface.
    GeminiFailedPreconditionException
    Thrown when a precondition is not met.
    GeminiInternalException
    Thrown when an unexpected error occurs on the server side.
    GeminiInvalidArgumentException
    Thrown when the request contains an invalid argument.
    GeminiNotFoundException
    Thrown when the requested resource is not found.
    GeminiPermissionDeniedException
    Thrown when the API key doesn't have sufficient permissions.
    GeminiRequestExecutor
    Executes a GenerateContentRequest using a GenerationResource.
    GeminiResourceExhaustedException
    Thrown when the rate limit is exceeded.
    GeminiResult
    Represents a result from the Gemini API, providing both the raw GenerateContentResponse and convenient shortcuts for accessing common data.
    GeminiResult.GeminiResultBuilder  
    GeminiUnavailableException
    Thrown when the service is temporarily overloaded or unavailable.
    GenerateAnswerRequest
    Request to generate a grounded answer from the model given an input GenerateAnswerRequest.
    GenerateAnswerRequest.GenerateAnswerRequestBuilder  
    GenerateAnswerResponse
    Response from the model for a grounded answer.
    GenerateAnswerResponse.GenerateAnswerResponseBuilder  
    GenerateContentRequest
    Request to generate a completion from the model.
    GenerateContentRequest.GenerateContentRequestBuilder  
    GenerateContentRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating GenerateContentRequest instances in a fluent and intuitive way.
    GenerateContentResponse
    response from the model supporting multiple candidates.
    GenerateContentResponse.GenerateContentResponseBuilder  
    GenerateTextRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating GenerateContentRequest instances specifically for generating text in a fluent and intuitive way.
    GenerateTextResponse
    Response from the model supporting multiple candidates.
    GenerateTextResponse.GenerateTextResponseBuilder  
    GenerationConfig
    Configuration options for model generation and outputs.
    GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder  
    GenerationConfigBuilder
    Builder for creating GenerationConfig instances.
    GenerationContentExample
    Example demonstrating the usage of the refactored builders in the Gemini4j library.
    GenerationResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Generation resource of the Gemini API.
    GenerationResourceBuilder
    Builder class for constructing GenerateContentRequest objects.
    GenerationResourceBuilder.GenerationResourceBuilderBuilder  
    GenerationResourceImpl
    Implementation of the GenerationResource interface for interacting with the Generation resource of the Gemini API.
    GroundingAttribution
    Attribution for a source that contributed to an answer.
    GroundingAttribution.GroundingAttributionBuilder  
    GroundingPassage
    Passage included inline with a grounding configuration.
    GroundingPassage.GroundingPassageBuilder  
    GroundingPassageId
    Identifier for a part within a GroundingPassage.
    GroundingPassageId.GroundingPassageIdBuilder  
    GroundingPassages
    A repeated list of passages.
    GroundingPassages.GroundingPassagesBuilder  
    HarmBlockThreshold
    Represents the threshold for blocking content based on the probability of harm, as assessed by the Gemini API's safety system.
    HarmBlockThreshold.HarmBlockThresholdBuilder  
    HarmBlockThresholdBuilder
    Builder for creating HarmBlockThreshold instances.
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds that determine when the Gemini API should block content based on its safety assessment.
    HarmCategory
    Represents a category of potential harm that the Gemini API can assess in generated content.
    HarmCategory.HarmCategoryBuilder  
    HarmCategoryBuilder
    Builder for creating HarmCategory instances.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that the Gemini API can assess in generated content.
    HarmProbability
    Represents the probability that a piece of content generated by the Gemini API is harmful according to the API's safety classification system.
    HarmProbability.HarmProbabilityBuilder  
    HarmProbabilityEnum
    Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category assessed by the Gemini API's safety system.
    HttpClient
    Interface defining the contract for HTTP client implementations.
    HttpClientBuilder
    Builder for creating HttpClient instances.
    HttpClientBuilder.HttpClientBuilderBuilder  
    HttpClientType
    Enum representing the available HTTP client types.
    HttpException
    Exception class representing an error during a Gemini API request.
    HttpResponse
    Represents an HTTP response.
    InputFeedback
    Feedback related to the input data used to answer the question, as opposed to model-generated response to the question.
    InputFeedback.InputFeedbackBuilder  
    JacksonJsonService
    Default implementation of the JsonService interface using Jackson.
    JsonException
    Exception class representing an error during JSON serialization or deserialization.
    JsonService
    Interface defining the contract for JSON serialization and deserialization.
    JsonServiceBuilder
    Builder for creating JsonService instances.
    JsonServiceBuilder.JsonServiceBuilderBuilder  
    JsonServiceType
    Enum representing the available JSON service types.
    ListCachedContentsResponse
    Response with CachedContents list.
    ListCachedContentsResponse.ListCachedContentsResponseBuilder  
    ListModel
    Response from ListModel containing a paginated list of Models.
    ListModel.ListModelBuilder  
    ListPermissionsResponse
    Response from ListPermissions containing a paginated list of permissions.
    ListPermissionsResponse.ListPermissionsResponseBuilder  
    Message
    A message within a conversation.
    Message.MessageBuilder  
    MessagePrompt
    The structured textual input given to the model as a prompt.
    MessagePrompt.MessagePromptBuilder  
    MetadataFilter
    User provided filter to limit retrieval based on Chunk or Document level metadata values.
    MetadataFilter.MetadataFilterBuilder  
    Mode
    Represents the execution mode for function calling in the Gemini API.
    Mode.ModeBuilder  
    ModeBuilder
    Builder for creating Mode instances.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling in the Gemini API, dictating how the model handles function predictions within a conversation.
    Model
    Information about a Generative Language Model.
    Model.ModelBuilder  
    ModelResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Model resource of the Gemini API.
    ModelResourceImpl
    Implementation of the ModelResource interface for interacting with the Model resource of the Gemini API.
    ModelTool
    Singleton class that manages a list of available Gemini models.
    Operator
    Represents a comparison operator used in metadata filters for the Gemini API.
    Operator.OperatorBuilder  
    OperatorEnum
    Defines the comparison operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata in the Gemini API.
    Part
    A datatype containing media that is part of a multipart Content message.
    Part.PartBuilder  
    PartBuilder
    Builder for creating Part instances.
    Permission
    Represents a permission.
    Permission.PermissionBuilder  
    PermissionState
    Represents the state of a permission within the Gemini API.
    PermissionState.PermissionStateBuilder  
    PermissionStateEnum
    Represents the possible states of a permission within the Gemini API, indicating whether the permission is currently active and grants access or is inactive and denies access.
    PromptFeedback
    A set of the feedback metadata the prompt specified in GenerateContentRequest.content.
    PromptFeedback.PromptFeedbackBuilder  
    PropertiesLoader
    Utility class for loading properties from a properties file.
    RelevantChunk
    The information for a chunk relevant to a query.
    RelevantChunk.RelevantChunkBuilder  
    ResourceBuilder
    Builder for creating resource instances for interacting with the Gemini API.
    SafetyRating
    Safety rating for a piece of content.
    SafetyRating.SafetyRatingBuilder  
    SafetySetting
    Safety setting, affecting the safety-blocking behavior.
    SafetySetting.SafetySettingBuilder  
    SafetySettingBuilder
    Builder class for constructing SafetySetting objects.
    Schema
    The Schema object allows the definition of input and output data types.
    Schema.SchemaBuilder  
    SchemaBuilder
    Builder for constructing Schema objects.
    SemanticRetrieverChunk
    Identifier for a Chunk retrieved via Semantic Retriever specified in the GenerateAnswerRequest using SemanticRetrieverConfig.
    SemanticRetrieverChunk.SemanticRetrieverChunkBuilder  
    SemanticRetrieverConfig
    Configuration for retrieving grounding content from a Corpus or Document created using the Semantic Retriever API.
    SemanticRetrieverConfig.SemanticRetrieverConfigBuilder  
    State
    Represents the current processing state of a Chunk in the Gemini API.
    State.StateBuilder  
    StateEnum
    Defines the possible processing states of a Chunk in the Gemini API, representing the different stages of its lifecycle.
    StringList
    User provided string values assigned to a single metadata key.
    StringList.StringListBuilder  
    SupportedGenerationMethod
    Represents the supported generation methods for Gemini models, providing a standardized way to identify the different capabilities of each model.
    TaskType
    Represents the type of task for which the embedding will be used.
    TaskType.TaskTypeBuilder  
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which a text embedding will be used in the Gemini API.
    TextPrompt
    The free-form input text given to the model as a prompt.
    TextPrompt.TextPromptBuilder  
    Tool
    Tool details that the model may use to generate response.
    Tool.ToolBuilder  
    ToolBuilder
    Builder for creating Tool instances.
    ToolConfig
    The Tool configuration containing parameters for specifying Tool use in the request.
    ToolConfig.ToolConfigBuilder  
    ToolConfigBuilder
    Builder for creating ToolConfig instances.
    Type
    Represents an OpenAPI data type used for defining parameters and schemas in the Gemini API.
    Type.TypeBuilder  
    TypeBuilder
    Builder for creating Type instances.
    TypeEnum
    Defines the supported OpenAPI data types used for specifying parameters and schemas in the Gemini API.
    UsageMetadata
    Metadata on the usage of the cached content.
    UsageMetadata.UsageMetadataBuilder  
    User
    The user that sent this message.
    User.UserBuilder
